creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, 2 Jul 2007, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of games/linux-ut,
>
> Please note that PR ports/114207 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114207

Jonathan, thank you for the report.  This is a duplicate of
ports/113934[1].  You may want to use that patch since UT may no longer
run without it due to the Xorg 7.2 upgrade.

Sean
   1. http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/113934
-- 
scf@FreeBSD.org
